title: Bed Bug Treatment in Larchmont, Westchester | $1,200 - $3,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bed bug treatment in Larchmont, Westchester. Fast, effective extermination for homes and apartments. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bed bug treatment services throughout Larchmont, Westchester, protecting homes and families from these persistent pests. Our experienced technicians use proven heat treatment and chemical methods to eliminate bed bug infestations in single-family homes, apartments, and condos across this beautiful village. With pricing ranging from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size and severity of the infestation, we offer effective solutions tailored to your specific needs.
whyUs: Our team has extensive experience treating bed bugs in Larchmont's diverse housing stock, from historic colonials near Manor Park to modern apartments along Boston Post Road. We use EPA-approved treatments, offer same-day service when available, and back our work with a comprehensive warranty to ensure your home stays bed bug-free.
localContext: Larchmont's tree-lined streets and charming downtown attract visitors and residents alike, but proximity to public transportation and vacation travel can sometimes introduce bed bugs to even the most well-maintained homes. Our technicians are familiar with the unique needs of Larchmont properties, from the grand Victorians in the Manor Park Historic District to the waterfront homes near Larchmont Manor Beach Club.

faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Larchmont?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Larchmont typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, the severity of the infestation, and the treatment method used. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Larchmont homes?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and targeted chemical applications. Heat treatment raises the temperature in affected rooms to levels that kill bed bugs at all life stages, while our chemical treatments use EPA-approved products that are safe for families and pets when applied correctly.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat a bed bug infestation in Larchmont?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service in most cases for Larchmont residents. Heat treatments can typically be completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require multiple visits spaced 2-3 weeks apart to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Larchmont home during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we raise temperatures to effective levels. For chemical treatments, we recommend staying away for 4-6 hours after application to allow products to dry completely. All our methods are safe for return once the treatment period is complete.
